'''Velrugha''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who commanded a military force during a [[Hutt-Riileb conflict|number of invasion attempts]] made on the [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Riileb/Legends|Riileb]]. The planet's [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] native [[Species/Legends|species]], also called the [[Riileb (species)|Riileb]], had been discovered previously by [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanese]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] who served the Hutts; the Riilebs had resisted the visitors' efforts to convince them to enter [[Slavery/Legends|voluntary servitude]] to the Hutts.<ref name="AE" />

Taking a more forceful approach to enslaving the species, Velrugha's forces attempted to invade and take control of the planet several times but were successfully repelled on each attempt. Velrugha eventually gave up taking the planet and left the Riileb alone to search for other weaker or more compliant species to conquer. After Velrugha's attempted invasions, the Riileb remained independent of the Hutts.<ref name="AE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Velrugha was first mentioned in [[1997]] in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 13|thirteenth]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', a series of supplements to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' from [[West End Games]]. The Hutt was mentioned in the article "[[Alien Encounters (article series)|Alien Encounters]]," which was written by [[Brian Smithson]].<ref name="AE" />
